Mo For Order Compelling Responses To Request For Production Of Documents, And For Deemed Admissions
Off Calendar Feb-17-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff's Motion To Compel Responses To Request For Production of Documents and For Deemed Admissions is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Defendant is ordered to respond to the request for production within 15 days of notice of this order. The Requests for Admissions are deemed admitted. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $452.50, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
